messages.content: Michael is at that really famous museum in France looking at its most famous painting. However, the artist who made this painting just makes Michael think of his favorite cartoon character from his childhood. What was the country of origin of the thing that the cartoon character usually holds in his hand?

Without any additional context or information, it is difficult to determine the country of origin of the thing that the cartoon character usually holds in his hand. It could be from any country that has produced cartoons or characters with similar items.
I've given you all the information you need, work through the problem step by step.
